metadata.title: Vegvisr Ecosystem — App Registry
metadata.description: Complete inventory of all apps, workers, libraries, and services in the Vegvisr ecosystem. Part of Layer 4 (System Architecture) in the agent consciousness model.

nodes.label: # Ecosystem App Registry
nodes.info:
# Vegvisr Ecosystem — App Registry

This graph catalogs all 21 projects in the Vegvisr workspace.

## Categories
- **Core Platform** (1): The main vegvisr-frontend monorepo
- **AI & Agents** (2): Agent-Builder, aichat-vegvisr
- **Frontend Apps** (6): photos, login, vemail, chat, connect, realtime
- **Mini Apps** (5): sound_phonems, audio_studio, calendar, Contacts, Knowledge-Editor
- **Mobile** (1): hellovegvisr-flutte (Flutter)
- **Library** (1): vegvisr-ui-kit (npm)
- **Backend** (1): slowyou.io (Express/MongoDB)
- **Email Workers** (2): universi.no, msneeggen store workers
- **Templates** (2): my-test-app, spotlight-ts

## Metadata Fields Per App
| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| type | frontend, worker, library, mobile, backend, mini-app, template |
| stack | Primary technologies |
| deployment | cloudflare-pages, wrangler-deploy, git-push, npm-publish, apk-r2 |
| domain | Production URL(s) |
| workers | Sub-workers (name + route) |
| bindings | Service bindings, D1, R2, KV |
| depends_on | Other ecosystem apps/workers |
| status | active, development, template, deprecated |

nodes.label: # vegvisr-frontend
nodes.info:
# vegvisr-frontend

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **icon** | ![icon](https://vegvisr.org/favicon.ico) |
| **type** | Core Platform (frontend + 17 workers) |
| **stack** | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vite + Bootstrap + Mermaid + Cytoscape + Monaco Editor |
| **deployment** | Vue: Vite build (Cloudflare Pages); Workers: wrangler deploy individually |
| **domain** | vegvisr.org (main), api.vegvisr.org (api-worker), knowledge.vegvisr.org (dev-worker) |
| **bindings** | D1: vegvisr_org, R2: WEB_COMPONENTS, 30+ service bindings to specialized workers |
| **depends_on** | anthropic-worker, openai-worker, grok-worker, perplexity-worker, auth-worker, email-worker, sms-worker, user-keys-worker, aff-worker |
| **purpose** | Core platform. AI-powered AppBuilder, knowledge graphs, web components, affiliate system, onboarding, portfolio |
| **status** | active |

## Deployed Workers (17 Total)

### Core Infrastructure
1. **Videostream Worker** — Real-time video streaming and processing
2. **Knowledge Graph Worker** — Graph CRUD operations, query engine, persistence
3. **Agent Worker (Orchestrator)** — Agentic loop orchestration, Claude integration, SSE streaming

### AI & LLM Integration
4. **Anthropic Worker** — Claude API integration, model routing
5. **OpenAI Worker** — OpenAI API integration, GPT models
6. **Perplexity Worker** — Perplexity API integration, web search
7. **Grok Worker** — Grok API integration, xAI models
8. **Gemini Worker** — Google Gemini API integration, multimodal models

### Application Services
9. **Vegvisr API Worker** — App generation, component manager, 10K+ lines
10. **Albums Worker** — Photo/album management and storage
11. **Photos Worker** — Image processing and gallery operations
12. **Audio Portfolio Worker** — Audio file management and playback
13. **Email Worker** — Email sending and management
14. **Calendar Worker** — Calendar sync and scheduling
15. **Group Chat Worker** — Real-time group messaging

### Utility Workers
16. **Drizzle Worker** — Database ORM and query builder
17. **random-image-worker** — Random image generation and selection

nodes.label: # Agent-Builder
nodes.info:
# Agent-Builder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **icon** | ![icon](https://favicons.vegvisr.org/favicons/1772371108448-1-1772371121111-32x32.png) |
| **type** | Frontend app + Worker |
| **stack** | React 19 + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + React Flow + Mermaid + Anthropic SDK |
| **deployment** | Pages: git push (Cloudflare Pages); Worker: wrangler deploy |
| **domain** | agent.vegvisr.org (worker route) |
| **workers** | agent-worker — agentic loop with Claude, SSE streaming |
| **bindings** | KG_WORKER, ANTHROPIC, PERPLEXITY, API_WORKER, ALBUMS_WORKER, OPENAI_WORKER, AUDIO_PORTFOLIO, D1: vegvisr_org |
| **depends_on** | knowledge-graph-worker, anthropic-worker, perplexity-worker, openai-worker, albums-worker, audio-portfolio-worker |
| **purpose** | AI agent system. Chat interface (AgentChat) with Claude-powered agent that creates/reads/modifies knowledge graphs. Contract editor with React Flow canvas |
| **status** | active |
